title: theme — user-facing notifications
description: Laravel notifications (mail / database / broadcast). Every notification carries a consent tier — activated notifications are transactional_optional (admin ops confirmation), accessibility recommendations are functional_optional.

notifications.purpose: Confirm the theme activation landed. Includes activated_at timestamp + mode + preset name + compiled_css_url preview link.

notifications.trigger: ThemePresetPublished event fired for a tenant-custom preset. NOT fired for platform presets (those broadcast via the platform-admin surface separately).
notifications.purpose: Notify the tenant that their custom preset is now available for selection in the preset picker.

notifications.trigger: ContrastAuditor detects a color pair on an active theme dropping below WCAG AA (4.5:1 body / 3:1 large text). Runs on ThemeActivated + on any ThemeTokenOverridden that affects a color token.
notifications.purpose: Recommend accessibility improvements to the theme. NEVER blocks — the tenant is free to ship the theme as-is; the notification surfaces the finding for review.
notifications.opt_out: Recipients may opt out via NotificationPreference (category=theme.accessibility). Owner + admin roles may re-enable per-user.
